warnings.explanation: Despite should introduce a noun phrase or gerund, not a full clause.
Although should introduce a full clause. Use despite before a noun phrase.
Sentence-initial linking adverbials normally need a comma.
Due to should be followed by a noun phrase; use because before a clause.
Because introduces a clause; because of introduces a noun phrase.
